name: cookie-consent
description: Validate GA4 fires only after consent , and Consent Mode v2 states are correct

testCases.name: should set default cookie context with only necessary cookies enabled
steps: Open a fresh browser context (no prior cookies)
Read the cookie-context cookie or localStorage key

testCases.name: should set all cookie context values to true when user accepts all
steps: Wait for cookie consent banner to appear
Read the cookie-context cookie or localStorage key

testCases.name: should reset all cookie context values to false when user refuses
steps: Wait for cookie consent banner to appear
Read the cookie-context cookie or localStorage key

testCases.name: should not fire GA4 dataLayer events before consent is granted
steps: Assert no GA4 / gtag events fired before accepting consent
assertions: window.dataLayer contains no analytics events before consent

testCases.name: should fire GA4 dataLayer events after accepting consent
steps: Accept all cookies via the banner
Assert GA4 / gtag events are present in dataLayer
assertions: window.dataLayer contains analytics events after consent

testCases.name: should display a compliant cookie banner
steps: Wait for cookie consent banner to appear
assertions: Banner text includes privacy policy reference
